## Vertical or Role Guide

## Audience

Which vertical and role does this guide serve, and what workflow evidence supports it?

## Required checks

- [ ] Frontmatter uses `content_type: role-guide`
- [ ] `review_status`, `assumptions`, and `risks` are set
- [ ] Industry context is grounded in real work
- [ ] Scorecard usage is linked back to the canonical rubric
- [ ] Linked examples are included
- [ ] `npm run validate:content` passes
